unit.name: Diffusion intuition and the move to rectified flow
unit.description: Introduces diffusion as iterative denoising and sets up rectified flow as the lecture's clean diffusion formalism.
unit.summary: The lecture transitions to diffusion models, warning that the literature has many competing mathematical formalisms and notation choices, while this lecture will use the cleaner rectified-flow view [ts=1855s], [ts=1900s]. The core intuition is that diffusion, like GANs, tries to convert samples from a simple noise distribution into samples from pdata, but instead of learning a one-shot deterministic map G(z), it learns an iterative denoising procedure [ts=1919s], [ts=1935s]. The noise variable must have the same shape as the data, and noisy samples are described by a noise level t where t=0 is clean data and t=1 is full noise [ts=1946s], [ts=1978s]. A neural network is trained to take a noisy sample xt and t and remove a small amount of noise [ts=2013s]. At inference time, sampling starts from pure noise and applies the network repeatedly until a clean-looking generated sample emerges [ts=2046s], [ts=2101s]. The segment ends by narrowing from the general diffusion picture to rectified flow, treated here as a diffusion-style model [ts=2155s].

key_points.text: Diffusion literature has many mathematical formalisms, so the lecture uses rectified flow as a clean implementation.
Diffusion converts noise samples into data samples using iterative denoising rather than a one-shot generator.
The noise distribution must have the same shape as the data.
Noise level t ranges from 0 for clean data to 1 for full noise.
A denoising network receives xt and t and learns to remove a small amount of noise.
Inference starts from pure noise and repeatedly applies the denoiser to reach a clean sample.

kp_catalog.name: Diffusion denoising intuition
kp_catalog.description: Diffusion generates by starting from noise and repeatedly removing small amounts of noise.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because diffusion denoising intuition formalizes how diffusion generates by starting from noise and repeatedly removing small amounts of noise, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.

kp_catalog.name: Rectified flow formulation
kp_catalog.description: Rectified flow trains a network to predict a velocity vector along a straight path between data and noise.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because rectified flow formulation formalizes how rectified flow trains a network to predict a velocity vector along a straight path between data and noise, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.
